C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI review confirmed RP00.P00.M00.S01 scope inventory, authority boundaries, non-goals, H00/C00 wiring, and evidence chain. No P0/P1 findings; three P3 evidence-hygiene or future-test notes.

findings.title: Closeout evidence artifacts share an identical second-level timestamp
findings.details: command-evidence, prior claude-review-result, and construction-inspection shared the same timestamp, weakening the sequential gate authenticity signal even though the content was consistent.
findings.recommendation: Record actual Claude CLI execution metadata and refresh inspection timestamps after the real review.

findings.title: Validator does not guard the scope_inventory explicit_non_goals and controlled_workflows arrays
findings.details: Validator checks reviewed sources, controlled capabilities, owned entities, and acceptance risks, but not the dedicated explicit_non_goals and controlled_workflows inventory arrays.
findings.recommendation: Add presence/non-empty checks for explicit_non_goals and controlled_workflows or carry this as a future validator hardening note.

findings.title: Same-file mirror assertions remain largely tautological
findings.details: Several checks mirror values in the same contract file; cross-file wiring and future behavior tests provide stronger assurance.
findings.recommendation: Add independent behavior tests when RP00.P01/RP00.P02 introduce model or service behavior.

parsed_review.review_notes: Actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only CLI review completed. No P0/P1 findings; P2 findings, if any, are absent; P3 notes are recorded in adjudication and do not block this subphase.

review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json
